name: Dryvebox Pittsburgh
about: Dryvebox Pittsburgh is a mobile golf simulator venue that brings a climate-controlled, TrackMan-powered golf studio directly to events. They offer patented mobile trailers and indoor pop-up enclosures for various occasions including corporate events, private parties, and brand activations. The service includes trained staff handling setup and operation, with all equipment provided, allowing guests to play on hundreds of famous courses and access advanced swing analysis technology. Their mobile units are designed to accommodate different event spaces, with setup times ranging from 10 to 60 minutes depending on the configuration.
why_golfers_like_it: Mobile service brings golf simulator experience directly to any location
Climate-controlled environment ensures comfort regardless of weather conditions
Advanced TrackMan technology provides accurate swing and ball data for improvement
Professional staff handles setup and operation, allowing clients to focus on enjoying the event

food_and_drink.notes: Parties and events can include food; venue mentions bringing refreshments to enjoy while playing
No mention of alcohol service provided by the venue

simulator_hardware.notes: Tour-trusted TrackMan powers all mobile golf simulators

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: No, Dryvebox provides all golf clubs and equipment needed for the experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, you can bring food and refreshments to enjoy during your event. The venue mentions having a party deck and music to enhance the experience.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time for 18 holes is not explicitly stated, but guests can choose specific courses and holes to play, with the simulator offering various game modes and competitions.

faq.question: Is Dryvebox kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Dryvebox is kid-friendly. They mention accommodating beginners to pros and have activities for children, including golf instruction for young players.
